Review [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the branch workflow,
required local checks, and when docs or changelog updates are expected.

## Summary

- describe the user-visible change
- list any internal refactors worth calling out

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run pack:check`

## Notes

- mention release, docs, or follow-up work if relevant
